topics.title: Artie Lange's Potential Departure
topics.summary: The studio discusses Artie Lange's health, his potential departure from the show in January, and a recent vacation he took.

topics.title: Reflections on Jackie's Departure and Show History
topics.summary: The studio discusses the legacy of former co-host Jackie Green, the production of upcoming show specials, and personal reflections on past professional tensions.

topics.title: Artie Lange's Departure from the Show
topics.summary: The studio discusses Artie Lange's announcement of his departure due to health and personal struggles while reacting to media coverage of the news.

topics.title: Pop Culture and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses celebrity news involving Paris Hilton, Sarah Silverman, and various pop culture figures while debating personal career choices and media appearances.

topics.title: Robin Quivers' Detox Program
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding Robin Quivers hiring a naturopathic doctor to oversee her two-week detox and weight loss regimen.

topics.title: Robin's Detox Program and Medical Credentials
topics.summary: The studio discusses a naturopathic doctor's role in Robin's juice-based detox regimen while questioning the accreditation of her medical school.

topics.title: Penthouse Magazine Feature and Personal Background
topics.summary: The studio features Kimberly Williams as she discusses her appearance in Penthouse magazine, her previous career as a flight attendant, her personal life, and various sexual fantasies.

topics.title: Bijou Phillips and Career Reflections
topics.summary: The studio features Bijou Phillips discussing her past relationships, her father’s legacy in music, and her transition into film roles.

topics.title: Bijou Phillips Discusses Past Relationships and Media Rumors
topics.summary: The studio features Bijou Phillips as she addresses rumors regarding her past, discusses her friendship with Paris Hilton, and reflects on a previous relationship with Elijah "Blue" Allman.

topics.title: Hostel 2 Promotion and Infrared Sauna Demonstration
topics.summary: The studio features actress Bijou Phillips promoting her film Hostel 2 before a segment involving a guest demonstration of an infrared sauna detox treatment.

topics.title: Disabled Veteran Seeking Social Security Assistance
topics.summary: The show features a call from Paul Carter, a disabled veteran from Florida who is struggling to secure social security benefits and facing the loss of his breathing machine's power.

topics.title: A Guest's Detox Experience
topics.summary: The studio features a guest undergoing an intense sweat-based detox while the hosts share stories about a farm pig and a comedy tour mishap.

topics.title: Robin Quivers Detox and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding Robin Quivers' detox program, the physical state of Artie Lange after sauna use, reports on an alleged mole within the show's staff, and various celebrity news stories involving Mike Tyson and Angie Everhart.

topics.title: Celebrity Relationships and Political Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses a past relationship with Angie Everhart, legal issues involving Johnny Knoxville, the status of Amy Fisher and Joey Butafuco, and various political critiques regarding immigration policy and the Iraq War.

topics.title: Media Ownership, Political Representation, and Current Events
topics.summary: The studio discusses the impact of media deregulation on corporate ownership, the disparity in Senate representation between states, the release of Dr. Jack Kevorkian, and various entertainment news updates.
